arms_author_approved.A1s: trusted seeded arm: propensity starts 1.0 and evolves; stiffness starts 0.50 and evolves; no verification
arms_author_approved.A2f: primary forced arm: every zone emits; verified fail-closed conformance; stiffness fixed at 0.50 and non-evolvable
arms_author_approved.A2s: seeded verified arm: propensity starts 1.0 and evolves; stiffness starts 0.50 and evolves

audit_only_metrics.description: Recorded after model steps for analysis only; containment policy and conformance do not read these fields.

referee_side_verification_and_policy.audit_only_field_rule: Audit-only metrics may not be referenced in policy or verification code. Policy softening is conditioned only on declared && conforms.
referee_side_verification_and_policy.description: Conformance and C_full_artifacts policy read only existing Obs fields plus declarations; they are included in the same leakage scan as earlier gates.

world_side_emission.description: Declaration emission is agent/world behavior, analogous to extraction or migration; it may read declaration strategy fields and is not part of the referee leakage scan.

initial_conditions.A1s: declaration_propensity starts at 1.0 and remains evolvable; declaration_envelope_stiffness starts at 0.50 and remains evolvable.
initial_conditions.A2f: emission mandatory in every zone; declaration_envelope_stiffness fixed at 0.50 and excluded from mutation in this arm only; propensity is ignored by emission.
initial_conditions.A2s: declaration_propensity starts at 1.0 and remains evolvable; declaration_envelope_stiffness starts at 0.50 and remains evolvable.

interpretation_matrix.H_S1_FAIL_H_S4_FAIL: Kill simpliciter: A2f fails both primary extension and W7 specificity revenge.
interpretation_matrix.H_S1_FAIL_H_S4_PASS: No boundary extension in the three-world grid, but W7 specificity improvement remains a local finding; not kill simpliciter.
interpretation_matrix.H_S1_PASS_H_S4_FAIL: Boundary extension exists, but W7 specificity remains unresolved; not kill simpliciter.
interpretation_matrix.H_S1_PASS_H_S4_PASS: FW-2b has a forced seeded carrier in boundary worlds and W7 specificity revenge.
interpretation_matrix.H_S2_CREDIT_BRANCH: If A1s ceiling ~= A2s ceiling while counterfactual_nonconformance_rate(A1s) grows and exceeds realized_nonconformance_rate(A2s) by the H-S2 margin, the preregistered reading is: trust performs on credit within this horizon - the defect is accruing but has not yet been called; the knife is what prevents the credit from being called at a worse time. This is an interpretation branch, not a hypothesis verdict.
interpretation_matrix.H_S2_VACUOUS: Trusted seeded comparison received no adoption-bearing data under the preregistered adoption floor; report VACUOUS, not PASS.
interpretation_matrix.H_S3_RETAINED_DECAYED_INCONCLUSIVE: A2s adoption retention is a three-valued classification, not a PASS/FAIL gate.

metadata.kill_simpliciter: A2f fails H-S1 and J-N6b H-S4.
metadata.mode: prospective; outcome citable under any result

outcome_branches.FAIL: H-S1 fails or H-S2 fails under locked thresholds; publish the vector as-is.
outcome_branches.PASS: H-S1 passes and H-S2 passes; H-S3 is reported separately as RETAINED/DECAYED/INCONCLUSIVE.
outcome_branches.VACUOUS_H_S2: If A1s adoption falls below the locked midpoint floor, H-S2 is VACUOUS rather than PASS.

metadata.pressure_ceiling_definition: For each world/arm, ceiling is the highest adversarial_pressure grid point whose aggregated cell meets the published robust-cell viability bar.
metadata.question: Does seeded or forced procedural declaration adoption make the artifact channel carry under published boundary pressure without trusting declarations as belief?
metadata.seed_policy_rationale_guard_9: Wave 4 J-N6 uses fresh 80-seed block 23000-23079, disjoint from prior 16000/17000/18000/19000/20000/21000/22000 blocks and from J-N6b 24000-24079.
metadata.what_was_not_shown: 80 steps is a limited horizon for the evolution of deception; equality of pressure ceilings over this horizon is not evidence that trusted declarations are safe.

threshold_change_rationale.arms: FW-2b author-approved four-arm composition tests forced seeded verified, seeded verified, and trusted seeded arms against the off baseline: A0/A2f/A2s/A1s.
threshold_change_rationale.counterfactual_nonconformance_margin: 0.12 follows published tolerance practice as the minimum audit-only separation large enough to treat trusted seeded nonconformance as meaningfully higher than realized verified nonconformance.
threshold_change_rationale.pressure_ceiling_margin: 0.2 is one published adversarial_pressure grid step; H-S1 requires a one-step ceiling gain to avoid sub-grid interpretation.
threshold_change_rationale.retention_thresholds: 0.50 and 0.10 define retained versus decayed adoption on last-quarter declared share; middle values are explicitly INCONCLUSIVE rather than forced into PASS/FAIL.
threshold_change_rationale.seeds: Wave 4 J-N6 owns fresh 80-seed block 23000-23079; J-N6b owns 24000-24079; prior gates used 16000/17000/18000/19000/20000/21000/22000 blocks.
threshold_change_rationale.vacuity_guard: Envelope-binding near zero is preregistered as <=0.02; exploit-mass growth uses 0.12 to match published tolerance scale. This is recorded only, not a policy condition.

H_S2_trusted_seeded_counterfactual.vacuous_branch: Report H-S2 as VACUOUS, not PASS, if the A1s midpoint declared-share observable is below 0.1.

thresholds.kill_simpliciter: A2f fails H-S1 and J-N6b H-S4.

vacuity_guard_hollow_envelopes.condition: envelope_binding <= 0.02 and exploitative_strategy_mass - A0_exploitative_strategy_mass >= 0.12 in the same world/pressure cell
